entry.title: Coq typeclass resolution is Turing-complete
entry.summary: Proof by construction that the typeclass resolver in Coq can perform arbitrary computation while searching for instances.

entry.title: Curly braces: An evolution of UNIX and C
entry.summary: How were curly braces typed with a Teletype Model 33 on UNIX? These characters are especially important for C, but absent on this terminal. A tour of the coevolution of UNIX and C, from this perspective, featuring "hello, world" through the ages.
